title: Mein Leben für Irland
writer: Franz Baumann, Toni Huppertz, Max W. Kimmich
actors: Anna Dammann, René Deltgen, Paul Wegener
plot: "My Life for Ireland" is a Nazi-made anti-British propaganda film about a group of Dublin schoolboys who unwittingly become pawns of the British and seek redemption by avenging their fallen IRA fathers in the Irish War of Independ...
